overall.description: A spaceship with glowing blue engine lights flies through a dark asteroid field in deep space. The footage shows continuous third-person perspective flight navigating through rocky debris and green nebula clouds, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with a dark teal color palette.

scene_state.functional_zone: open deep space with scattered asteroid debris

agents.ego_description: The spaceship flies steadily forward through open space, approaching a denser asteroid field with scattered rocky debris visible in the distance.

entered.detail: Small to medium-sized rocky asteroids floating in the distance against the dark nebula backdrop
Dark teal and green cosmic gas clouds forming the distant background of space

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a spaceship flying through open deep space. The environment is dark with a cool teal color palette, featuring scattered asteroid debris in the distance and a greenish nebula backdrop. The ship maintains a steady forward trajectory through the wide-open cosmic environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow flight corridor alongside massive vertical rock wall

events.description: Large vertical rock formation emerges on the left side, creating a narrow corridor effect as the ship flies alongside it

agents.ego_description: The spaceship continues flying forward, now navigating alongside a massive asteroid wall on the left while maintaining steady thrust.

entered.detail: Massive vertical asteroid wall with rough rocky texture passing by on the left side of the flight path

segments.scene_description: The spaceship enters a narrower flight corridor as a massive vertical rock formation appears on the left side. The asteroid wall creates a semi-enclosed feeling as the ship flies alongside it, with smaller debris now visible to the right. The lighting remains dim with the ship's blue engine lights providing the primary illumination against the dark rocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense asteroid field with nebula backdrop

events.description: Exits the narrow rock corridor into a denser field of scattered asteroids with prominent nebula clouds visible

agents.ego_description: The spaceship emerges from the rock corridor into a more open but debris-dense area, continuing its steady forward flight through the asteroid field.

entered.detail: Wispy green and teal nebula clouds becoming more prominent in the background

segments.scene_description: The spaceship exits the narrow corridor and enters a wider area filled with denser scattered asteroid debris. The large rock formation falls behind as the ship proceeds into open space, where green nebula clouds become more visible in the background. The field of view opens up while the density of small asteroids increases around the flight path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a spaceship navigates from the vast openness of deep space through a restrictive rocky corridor and back into a dense asteroid field. It begins with the ship gliding through a wide cosmic expanse characterized by a cool teal palette and a distant greenish nebula. As the trajectory continues, the environment tightens when a massive vertical rock formation emerges on the left, creating a semi-enclosed flight corridor where the ship's blue engine lights cast a glow against the dark stone. The scene then opens up as the ship exits the narrow passage, leaving the large formation behind. Finally, the field of view expands into a wider region where the green nebula clouds intensify and the density of scattered asteroid debris increases around the flight path.
